rationale.R1.2: The critique and recommendations are logically consistent with the provided artifact.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly discloses its uncertainty regarding some of the claims and assumptions made in the critique.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing claims and suggests improvements.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
